no: Convenience tweaks for Watcher's Keep puzzles by flamewing. v1.1. Deck of Many Things card selection and Machine of Lum the Mad result picking. All components are Watcher's Keep focused

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.myComps: Convenient/Cheating Machine of Lum the Mad -> Convenient: You can simply select the desired result, #21

sum: Convenience tweaks/cheats for BG2:ToB, BG2EE and EET

co.n: Convenient Deck of Many Things: Always win against Aesgareth
co.no: Guarantees winning the card game against Aesgareth in Watcher's Keep. Standalone — does not affect card choices
co.tp2n: Convenient Deck of Many Things: Always win against Aesgareth

co.no: See all cards and choose freely, but limited to 3 draws as normal
co.tp2n: Convenient: Select from normal available choices in each draw

co.no: All cards visible, relaxed draw limits
co.tp2n: Convenient Plus: As above, but ignore 'Bad Card' restrictions

co.no: All cards selectable in any of the 3 draws. Full control
co.tp2n: Cheesy: All cards can be selected in any of the 3 draws

co.n: Deck of Many Things: Full Cheat
co.no: Maximum cheat — all cards always available
co.tp2n: Cheating: As the cheesy version, but with infinite draws

co.n: Machine of Lum the Mad: Convenient
co.scn: Convenient/Cheating Machine of Lum the Mad
co.no: Simply select the desired result from the Machine. No guessing
co.tp2n: Convenient: You can simply select the desired result

co.n: Machine of Lum the Mad: Cheating
co.scn: Convenient/Cheating Machine of Lum the Mad
co.no: Full cheat mode for the Machine of Lum the Mad
co.tp2n: Cheating: As above, but with infinite stat bonuses
